name: Idle Commonwealth
short_description: Idle Commonwealth is an idle game that pays homage to the best of the idle genre. Start small, grow your commonwealth, maintain morale, establish governance, invent technologies, trade and conquer your neighbors.
detailed_description:
Idle Commonwealth is a incremental game where you will develop your community, increase the population, construct buildings, assign your residents to various professions, set taxes and governance, discover new technologies, and establish relations with other nations.

Main Features:

  • collect and produce various resources

  • build workplaces as well as housing for your population

  • research new technologies to unlock further development opportunities

  • establish the type of government and set tax rates

  • discover other nations

  • trade with or conquer your neighbors

  • earn in-game achievements to enhance your capabilities

  • prestige to boost your production and unlock new content

The game is still evolving!

The upcoming updates will include features such as genetic modifications for the population, space colonization, and more...
